title: DASBET Oil Extractor Pump Manual Fluid Extraction Pump Oil Suction Syringe Brake Fuel Transfer Pump Fluid Extraction & Fill Pump Automobile Gear Oil, Brake Fluid And Coolant Replacement Tool (200 ML)
features: Built to Last: The engine oil extractor pump is made of solid and durable materials. Its sturdy design guarantees a prolonged service life. Our syringe oil extractor pump includes dual rubber pads for a secure seal, preventing leakage.

All-in-One Set: The oil suction syringe set includes: a transparent syringe with a locking adapter, two spare rubber seal rings and two extension tubes enabling effortless liquid extraction or injection.The transparent bottle body with the marked scale allows for precise control of the flow rate.

Leak-Proof Design: Featuring double rubber pads securely fastened to the piston and a robust locking mechanism, our brake fluid extractor guarantees a reliable seal, effectively preventing oil leakage. Moreover, its detachable design facilitates easy cleaning and routine maintenance.

Easy to Operate: The hand oil change pump can be used to transfer automotive fluid easily. Just connect the hose extension to the syringe to effortlessly draw or inject fluid. The hose and seal can be quickly removed for cleaning or replacement.

Wide Compatibility : Our fuel transfer pump is applicable for extracting or changing engine oils and lubricants in various vehicles and equipment, including ATVs, boats, industrial gearboxes, motor vehicles, motorcycles, and RVs.The oil extractor pump is compatible with various fluids such as engine oil, gear oil, brake fluid, diesel fuel, coolants and more.
